attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  ,NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  ,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  ,CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 -- ,CBF.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG
 ,CASE 
    --WHEN NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
            WHEN NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
            WHEN COALESCE(CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) = -999 THEN 'N'
            WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y' END END     
           WHEN (MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'		   
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MT.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y' 
ELSE 'N'
       END AS CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG
  ,CBF.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='N' AND SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT< 0 THEN 'OTHERS'
 WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='N' AND SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT> 0  THEN 'DIRECT'
 /*WHEN  CBF.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS_ADJ' ) THEN '1-TIER'*/
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ'  ) AND PARTNER_TYPE_CD = 'VAR'               
 THEN '2-TIER(VAR)'
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ' ) AND PARTNER_TYPE_CD <> 'VAR'               
 THEN 'NON-VAR THRU DISTI'
 ELSE 'OTHERS'
 END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
CASE 
    --WHEN NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'REBATES' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
            WHEN NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD' THEN 'CHANNEL'
            WHEN NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'CHANNEL'
            WHEN COALESCE(CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) = -999 THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
            WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
           ELSE 'CHANNEL' END END     
           WHEN (MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'CHANNEL'		   
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MT.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'CHANNEL' 
ELSE 'NON CHANNEL'
       END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE  
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
  /*$$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES CRD,*/ /*Commented as part of perf recommendation by gmaharan*/
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_POS_PART_CBF CBF
  ON NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = CBF.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = CBF.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
  AND NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = CBF.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND NBM.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY = CBF.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = CBF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
 ON CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SOL 
  ON NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, SALES_COVERAGE_CODE from  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY GROUP BY 1,2,3) RSH 
  ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PEH 
  ON PEH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=CBF.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SOLDTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PSH 
  ON PSH.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=CBF.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
/*  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PRTNR_GLBL_RPRTG_PRFL PTNR
  ON PTNR.PARTNER_CNTRY_PRTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY     
  AND PTNR.BK_RPRTG_PROFILE_TYPE_NAME    ='PARTNER PRIMARY PRACTICE L1'
  AND PTNR.EFFECTIVE_END_DT='3500-01-01'
  AND MT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY  > 0 */
  WHERE NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE IN (SELECT CALENDAR_DATE FROM $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES GROUP BY 1)
 AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')
 AND NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY>=0
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
   NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  ,NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  ,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  ,CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  --,CBF.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG
  ,CASE 
    --WHEN NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
            WHEN NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
            WHEN COALESCE(CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) = -999 THEN 'N'
            WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y' END END      
		   WHEN (MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MT.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y' 
ELSE 'N'
       END AS CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG
  ,CBF.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='N' AND SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT< 0 THEN 'OTHERS'
 WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='N' AND SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT> 0  THEN 'DIRECT'
 /*WHEN  CBF.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS_ADJ' ) THEN '1-TIER'*/
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ'  ) AND PARTNER_TYPE_CD = 'VAR'               
 THEN '2-TIER(VAR)'
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ' ) AND PARTNER_TYPE_CD <> 'VAR'               
 THEN 'NON-VAR THRU DISTI'
 ELSE 'OTHERS'
 END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
CASE 
    --WHEN NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'REBATES' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
            WHEN NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD' THEN 'CHANNEL'
            WHEN NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'CHANNEL'
            WHEN COALESCE(CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) = -999 THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
            WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
           ELSE 'CHANNEL' END END      
		   WHEN (MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'CHANNEL'
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MT.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'CHANNEL' 
ELSE 'NON CHANNEL'
       END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE  
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
  /*$$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES CRD,*/ /*Commented as part of perf recommendation by gmaharan*/
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_POS_PART_CBF CBF
  ON NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = CBF.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = CBF.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
  AND NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = CBF.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND NBM.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY = CBF.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = CBF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
 ON CBF.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SOL 
 ON NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  LEFT JOIN ( select SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, SALES_COVERAGE_CODE from  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY group by 1,2,3) RSH 
  ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PEH 
  ON PEH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=CBF.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SOLDTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PSH 
  ON PSH.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=CBF.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
/*  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PRTNR_GLBL_RPRTG_PRFL PTNR
  ON PTNR.PARTNER_CNTRY_PRTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY     
  AND PTNR.BK_RPRTG_PROFILE_TYPE_NAME    ='PARTNER PRIMARY PRACTICE L1'
  AND PTNR.EFFECTIVE_END_DT='3500-01-01'
  AND MT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY  > 0 */
 WHERE NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE IN (SELECT CALENDAR_DATE FROM $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES GROUP BY 1)
 AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')
 AND NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY<0

SELECT
    STP3.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	STP3.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	STP3.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	STP3.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
	STP3.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
	STP3.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
	STP3.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
	STP3.PARTNER_COUNTRY,
	STP3.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY,
	COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
	CASE WHEN CDW.BCF_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN CDW.BCF_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
	WHEN PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN -999 
	     ELSE CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = -999 THEN -999 
			  ELSE CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
					ELSE CASE WHEN PARTNER_COUNTRY = DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY THEN  PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
							ELSE CASE WHEN COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT 
									ELSE COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)
								END
						END
				END
		END 
	END AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1,
	CASE WHEN PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N' 
	     ELSE 	CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = -999 THEN 'N' 
				ELSE 	CASE WHEN PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY THEN 'N' 
							ELSE 	CASE WHEN DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY = 'UNK' THEN  'N' 
										ELSE 	CASE WHEN PARTNER_COUNTRY = DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY THEN  'N' 
													ELSE 'Y' 
												END
									END
						END
			    END
	END AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
	STP3.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
	STP3.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_POS_PART_COUNTRY STP3
LEFT OUTER JOIN  (
					SELECT  PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
							COALESCE(PS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT,-999) PARTY_ID,
							COALESCE(DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
							COALESCE (BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
					FROM 
							$$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS,
							$$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY PC
					WHERE 	1=1
					AND 	PS.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY = PC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
					AND 	PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
					AND 	PC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
					QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
																ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
												ORDER BY PARTY_ID ASC) =1)  DSHIP
ON   	 STP3.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = DSHIP.GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
AND	 	 STP3.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY = DSHIP.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CDW_PSPK CDW
ON STP3.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT=CDW.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT

SELECT
		STP4.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
		STP4.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
		STP4.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
		STP4.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
		STP4.DV_END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
		STP4.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT,
		STP4.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
		STP4.PARTNER_COUNTRY,
		STP4.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY,
		STP4.DROP_SHIP_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
		STP4.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
		STP4.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLAG,
		COALESCE(RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,-999) 	AS LEVEL_1_SLS_HIERARCHY,
		CASE 
				WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
						ELSE 'Y'
		END AS SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG	,
		STP4.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
		STP4.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_POS_DSF_PSPK STP4
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  RSH
ON 	 STP4.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
